nodes.label: Native GraphQL Default Strategy

nodes.label: Native SQL Advanced Strategy
nodes.description: SQL Connect advanced strategy using raw SQL string literals via _select, _execute, etc. For PostGIS, window functions, complex aggregations. No type safety, strict positional parameters.

nodes.label: Cloud Functions Infinite Loop Risk
nodes.description: SQL Connect event triggers cannot provide before-snapshots. onMutationExecuted executing another SQL Connect mutation can trigger cascading loops. Must filter on operation to prevent.

nodes.label: Cloud Function Region Matching
nodes.description: Cloud Function region option must match the SQL Connect service location specified in dataconnect.yaml. Mandatory explicit region parameter.

nodes.label: Realtime Subscriptions
nodes.description: SQL Connect @refresh directive for time-based polling and event-driven updates. Supports onMutationExecuted triggers with CEL conditions, every:seconds polling, and subscribe() client-side API.

nodes.label: Positional Parameters $1 $2
nodes.description: Strict positional parameters required in Native SQL, named parameters forbidden

nodes.label: snake_case Conversion
nodes.description: Default PascalCase/camelCase to snake_case conversion in PostgreSQL unless overridden with @table/@col name

nodes.label: Any Return Type
nodes.description: Native SQL bypasses GraphQL typing, returns Any scalar requiring manual client-side casting

nodes.label: PL/pgSQL Injection Prevention
nodes.description: Stored procedures require USING clause, format(%I) for identifiers, and allowlist validation

nodes.label: String Literal Only SQL
nodes.description: SQL argument must be hardcoded string literal, not GraphQL variable; line comments forbidden

nodes.label: Auto-Generated CRUD Fields
nodes.description: SQL Connect auto-generates get/list/insert/insertMany/update/updateMany/upsert/delete/deleteMany per @table type

nodes.label: Filter Operators
nodes.description: eq, ne, gt, ge, lt, le, in, nin, isNull, contains, startsWith, endsWith, includes

nodes.label: Expression Operators _expr
nodes.description: eq_expr, lt_expr etc for comparing fields with server-side values like auth.uid and request.time

nodes.label: Logical Operators _or _and _not
nodes.description: Composable logical filtering with _or, _and, _not on query where clauses

nodes.label: Update Operators inc dec add remove
nodes.description: Increment/decrement for numeric types, add/remove/append/prepend for list types
nodes.norm_label: update operators inc dec add remove

nodes.label: Key Scalars
nodes.description: Auto-generated Movie_Key, User_Key types representing primary keys including composite keys

nodes.label: @transaction Directive
nodes.description: Ensures atomicity across multiple steps; all succeed or all rollback

nodes.label: Response Binding
nodes.description: Access results from previous steps using response.operationName.field in subsequent steps

nodes.label: Embedded Queries in Mutations
nodes.description: Run queries within transactions for validation using @check and @redact

nodes.label: @refresh Directive
nodes.description: Repeatable directive on queries defining when subscribers receive updated data

nodes.label: Time-Based Polling
nodes.description: @refresh(every: {seconds: 30}) with min 10s max 3600s interval

nodes.label: Event-Driven Refresh
nodes.description: @refresh(onMutationExecuted: {operation, condition}) with CEL condition expressions

hyperedges.description: All Firebase-backed services sharing the same Firebase project infrastructure. Auth, Firestore, Crashlytics, FCM, Remote Config, and Firestore-based data services.

hyperedges.description: Every screen and widget reads ZakatProvider.isDarkMode and applies ZakatTheme adaptive helpers for unified dark/light appearance.

hyperedges.label: Local Caching Strategy
hyperedges.description: Multi-layer local persistence: Hive for high-frequency data (gold prices 6h TTL, country sources 24h TTL, nisab history), SharedPreferences for app settings and wealth data.

hyperedges.label: Notification Systems
hyperedges.description: Three notification/display channels: FcmService (remote push via FCM topics), NotificationService (local scheduled: annual, reminder, Ramadan daily, Fitr), ZakatWidgetService (home screen widget display).

Firebase Auth provides parallel platform-specific SDK guides for Web, Android, Flutter, and iOS with provider-specific patterns.

Auth security chain: JWT tokens contain claims, claims are checked in security rules, and domain authorization prevents unauthorized OAuth operations.
All Firebase operations are CLI-first: npx firebase-tools is the universal interface for provisioning services, deploying, and managing resources across all skills.

hyperedges.label: flutter_managed_cmake_parity
hyperedges.description: Linux and Windows Flutter-managed CMake files are auto-generated by the Flutter toolchain. They share the same pattern: include generated_config.cmake, set EPHEMERAL_DIR, define FLUTTER_LIBRARY/FLUTTER_ICU_DATA_FILE/AOT_LIBRARY, build flutter_assemble custom target. Platform differences: Linux uses GTK/GLib/GIO pkg-config and .so; Windows uses .dll and C++ wrapper static libraries.

hyperedges.label: firebase_service_coverage
hyperedges.description: The Firebase suite covers five distinct concerns: core initialization, user authentication, cloud database (Firestore), crash reporting (Crashlytics), push notifications (messaging), and remote feature flags. This gives the zakat_app both client-side data and server-side observability.

This suggests the project was created from a Flutter template and renamed in pubspec but not in platform build files, or the Flutter tool resolves the binary name separately.
